events.name: solar_flare
events.description: Severe radiation event — all colonists confined to shielded core.

events.name: dust_storm
events.description: Fine Martian regolith clogs air filters and reduces solar output.

events.name: phobos_transit
events.description: Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

governance.rationale: Elect a council of 3 for 10 years.

meta_awareness.insight: Opal Creek notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.

memories.event: The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.
The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.

Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.

Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.
A rich vein of iron oxide uncovered during excavation.
